title: Pack of 2 Replacement Axe Head,Carbon Steel Outdoor Hatchet Axe Head,Multi Purpose Axe Head,for Garden Hunting Camping Wood Cutting Chopping Splitting
features: ☑DURABLE&RELIABLE：Forged from forged steel for a sharp edge that won't break. Ideal for replacing worn and damaged hoe axes.

☑PRODUCT SIZE：Overall dimensions: Blade width 7.8 inches /20cm, bend blade length 5.9inches /15cm, side blade length 3.5 inches /9cm. Handle mounting diameter 1 inch /2.6 cm, screw hole diameter 0.23 inch /0.6 cm.
☑MULTIPURPOSE USE：Widely used for gardening logging, outdoor adventure, camping survival, hunting, hiking and other outdoor activities.

☑ CURVED BLADE DESIGN：Each axe is carefully heat-treated and curved to make logging a breeze. Superior performance and durability. It is multi-purpose and perfect for combat axes, outdoor camping, and chopping firewood.

☑100% SERVICE：Please read the dimensions carefully before purchase to make sure the corner protectors fit the usage scenario. Any questions about the product, please feel free to contact us, we will help you.
